summary: Dedicated bill iCloud upload in Settings, improved sync logging, and CloudKit deploy tooling.

introduced: Upload Bills to iCloud button in Settings with the same export wait and logging as notes
changed: Sync log now covers notes and bills uploads, including bill record counts from CloudKit
CloudKit schema deploy script reads CLOUDKIT_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN from .env automatically
updated: generate-env and seed-secrets scripts for GCP Secret Manager
removed: Sync clipboard history toggle and the Bills sidebar Sync button
